assertions.title: Agent list page renders all agents

steps.expected: Agent list page with agents displayed
steps.observed: Page rendered with correct layout: title 'Agents', description, '+ New Agent' button

steps.action: Check for agent cards with name, role, status, adapter type
steps.expected: Agent cards with data from Supabase
steps.observed: Empty state: 'No agents yet - Create your first agent to get started.'

steps.action: Verify Supabase agents table via REST API
steps.observed: PGRST205 error: 'Could not find the table public.agents in the schema cache' — agents table does not exist in Supabase

evidence.consoleErrors: none (expected errors ignored: WebGL, React Router v7, thirdweb)

assertions.issues: The Supabase 'agents' table does not exist. The page structure is correct (title, description, New Agent button, empty state handling) and the code correctly renders name, role, status, adapter_type for each agent when data exists. But no agents can be fetched because the table hasn't been created. The app shows 'Demo fallback' mode.

assertions.title: Agent creation form functional

steps.expected: Agent creation form with all required fields
steps.observed: Form rendered correctly with all fields
Name text input present (required, marked with *)
Role combobox with options: CEO, CTO, COO, Manager, Engineer, Founding Engineer, Analyst, Designer, Researcher, Operations, Support, Custom
Reports To combobox present, defaulting to 'None (root agent)'
Adapter Type combobox with 9 options: Claude Code (local), Codex (local), Gemini CLI (local), OpenCode (local), Pi (local), Cursor CLI (local), OpenClaw Gateway, Shell Process, HTTP Webhook

steps.action: Fill form and click Create Agent
steps.observed: Toast error: 'No company found. Please complete onboarding first.' — submission blocked because no company row exists and agents table doesn't exist in Supabase

assertions.issues: Form UI is fully functional with all 5 required fields (name, title, role selector, reports_to picker, adapter_type dropdown) plus adapter-specific configuration fields that render dynamically. However, submission fails with 'No company found. Please complete onboarding first.' because (1) no company exists in Supabase and (2) the agents table itself does not exist in the database.

assertions.title: Agent detail page shows properties

steps.observed: Empty state: 'No agents yet' — no agents to click

steps.action: Navigate directly to /agents/:id with dummy UUID
steps.observed: Page shows 'Agent not found.' with 'Back to Agents' button after loading

steps.expected: Code renders name, role, status, adapter type, configuration, associated data
steps.observed: Code correctly renders: name, role, title, status (badge), adapter type, reports_to, capabilities, private cognition, venice model, created/updated times, adapter config JSON, recent runs, assigned issues

assertions.issues: No agents exist in Supabase (table doesn't exist), so the detail page cannot be tested with real data. The page route works (/agents/:id), loading state renders, and 'Agent not found' empty state displays correctly. Source code review confirms all required fields are rendered when data exists: agent name, role, status, adapter type, configuration details (JSON), and associated data (runs, issues).

assertions.title: Wallet address persisted to Supabase

steps.observed: VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true is active — AuthGate bypasses wallet check, useActiveAccount() returns undefined

steps.action: Check Supabase companies table for wallet_address
steps.observed: Cannot verify — no wallet connected, no companies table exists in Supabase (empty database)

assertions.issues: Dev bypass active (VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true) — no wallet connected to persist. This requires a real thirdweb client ID and wallet connection. Additionally, the Supabase database has no tables at all (no companies table exists).

assertions.title: Connected wallet address displayed in header

steps.action: Navigate to /cockpit and inspect header area
steps.expected: Truncated wallet address visible in header
steps.observed: Header shows: Toggle Sidebar, 'Agency', 'Cockpit', '0 live runs', '0 approvals', 'Supabase' link — no wallet address badge visible

steps.action: Review AppShell.tsx source code for wallet display
steps.observed: Lines 300-305: conditional Badge with Wallet icon renders walletAddress from useTruncatedAddress() hook — component exists but only renders when walletAddress is truthy

assertions.issues: Dev bypass active (VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true) — no wallet connected, so useTruncatedAddress() returns undefined/empty. The wallet address Badge component exists in AppShell.tsx (line 300-305) with correct rendering logic (Wallet icon + truncated address), but is conditionally hidden when no wallet is connected. Header wallet display shows nothing.

frictions.description: The Supabase database has NO tables at all — the agents, companies, runs, issues, and all other tables are missing. The app shows 'Demo fallback' mode. This blocks all agent management and auth persistence testing.

Agent creation form submission fails with 'No company found. Please complete onboarding first.' even though form UI is fully functional. This is a cascading dependency — onboarding creates the company, which is required before agents can be created.

blockers.description: Supabase database at lptryhnnhhvbblrrsaqa.supabase.co has no tables created. REST API returns PGRST205 for all table queries. The AGENTS.md notes 'New Supabase tables are created manually via SQL snippets' — it appears the migration SQL has not been run.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified Supabase connectivity via curl — connection succeeds but all table queries return PGRST205 (table not found). Cannot create tables per AGENTS.md boundary rules.

blockers.description: Dev bypass (VITE_DEV_SKIP_AUTH=true) prevents wallet connection testing. useActiveAccount() returns undefined, so wallet address cannot be persisted or displayed.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A — dev bypass is required for agent-browser testing since agent-browser cannot connect wallets. This is a known trade-off documented in user-testing.md.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 5 blocked. All agent management assertions (VAL-AGENT-001/002/003) are blocked because the Supabase agents table does not exist — the database has no tables at all. The agent creation form UI is fully functional with all required fields (name, title, role selector, reports_to picker, adapter_type dropdown with 9 adapter types) and dynamic adapter-specific configuration, but submission fails due to missing company/table. Auth assertions (VAL-AUTH-003/004) are blocked because dev bypass prevents wallet connection — the wallet display component exists in AppShell.tsx but doesn't render without a connected wallet.
